title: Vacancy for Hotel Manager at Air India

jsonLd.title: Vacancy for Hotel Manager at Air India
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Hotel Manager with drive and ambition, Air India in Gwalior is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Air India:
Air India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Assist in menu planning, costing, and food festival coordination
• Handle guest complaints and resolve issues promptly
• Manage front office operations including check-in/check-out
• Conduct regular guest satisfaction surveys and implement improvements
• Coordinate housekeeping and maintenance for room readiness
• Develop and maintain relationships with corporate clients
• Plan and execute banquets, events, and MICE functions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Food Safety
• Proficiency in Crisis Management
• Proficiency in PMS Systems
• Proficiency in MICE
• Proficiency in Revenue Management
• Proficiency in Event Management
• Proficiency in F&B Service
• Proficiency in Tour Planning

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Learning & development budget
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Gwalior, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Air India!
